description_long: This is a classic, upright fire hydrant with a cylindrical yellow body and a domed blue top. The hydrant features two prominent red hose connection outlets on either side and a third, slightly larger outlet facing forward, all with metallic caps. The base is wide and circular, bolted to the ground, and the body is adorned with vertical ridges and a manufacturer's marking on the rear. The surface shows signs of weathering, with visible scratches, rust, and paint wear, giving it a realistic, used appearance. The top of the hydrant has a central operating nut, and the outlets are capped but lack visible chains. The overall construction appears robust, typical of cast iron hydrants found in urban environments.
description: A weathered yellow fire hydrant with a blue domed top and three red hose outlets, featuring realistic wear and manufacturer markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main red hose outlet and the blue domed top, with the yellow body and bolted base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting one of the red hose outlets and the cylindrical yellow body, with the blue top partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the manufacturer's marking on the yellow body and both side hose outlets, with the blue top and base in view.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other red hose outlet and the yellow cylindrical body, with the blue top and base visible.
